flags.content: 🚨 OCCUPANCY CONFLICT — Property is Tenant Occupied per underwriting, but policy carries endorsement DL 24 16 07 88 — No Coverage for Non-Owner Occupied Dwellings. PA and management review required before strategy. Carrier already probing this via SPOL item 4 (changes in occupancy).

🚨 CALENDAR YEAR HURRICANE DEDUCTIBLE (DP 03 51 05 23) — Supplemental reporting requirement applies in Florida. Confirm whether any prior 2024 hurricane claim was filed. If already satisfied, deductible may be $0. If not, full $5,382 applies.

⚠ EXISTING DAMAGE EXCLUSION (FIM 00 30 03 07) — Carrier explicitly requesting separation of pre-loss vs. post-loss damage in document request item 3. Photo documentation of storm-specific damage is critical.
⚠ COSMETIC/AESTHETIC DAMAGE TO FLOORS (FIM 00 34 06 13) — Floor damage that is purely cosmetic may be excluded. Confirm functional damage if floors are added to scope.
⚠ SCREEN ENCLOSURE HURRICANE LIMITATION (FIM 00 18 12 23) — Verify at inspection whether a screen enclosure is present. Coverage limited if so.
ℹ ROOF AGE — 2006 roof, 18 years at date of loss. Depreciation applies. No roof payment schedule endorsement confirmed — carrier is on RCV basis per FIM DP 66 01 16.

strategy.subtitle: New Claim — Active Document Request

flags.content: 🚨 OCCUPANCY PROBE — Carrier SPOL item 4 explicitly requests 'changes in title or occupancy during the term of the policy.' This is not coincidental. Occupancy conflict must be resolved with PA and management before responding.
🚨 SWORN PROOF OF LOSS DEADLINE — SPOL due within 60 days of August 1, 2025. Hard deadline: approximately October 1, 2025. Do not miss this.
⚠ EXISTING DAMAGE SEPARATION — Carrier item 3 demands separation of pre-loss vs. post-loss damage. Prepare documentation that isolates Hurricane Milton damage from any pre-existing wear.
⚠ CONTRACTOR LIST REQUIRED — Carrier item 2 requests all contractors, salespersons, or trade individuals who have worked on or discussed this loss. Compile before responding.
ℹ Carrier acknowledged receipt of CCS estimate and photos submitted July 28, 2025. File is active — not denied, not below deductible.

spolChecklist: All photographs, images, statements, text messages, emails, estimates, job quotes, invoices, receipts
List of all contractors and trade individuals who worked on or discussed the loss
Detailed statement of damages separating pre-loss from post-loss
Detailed estimate of anticipated repair expenses
Pre-sale inspection report (if purchased within last 5 years)
Completed, fully executed, signed, notarized Sworn Proof of Loss

handoff.content: Claim is active. SPOL deadline ~Oct 1 2025. Occupancy conflict must be addressed before any carrier response. Routing: New Claim track.
